tool.name: timing_analyzer
tool.description: Statistical timing analysis for blind vulnerability detection.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Analyze single timing dataset - Compare two timing datasets - Determine if timing difference is significant - Get comprehensive statistics with percentiles

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The analysis action: - analyze: Analyze single timing dataset - compare: Compare two timing datasets - detect_difference: Determine if timing difference is significant - get_statistics: Get comprehensive statistics

parameter.name: times1
parameter.description: First set of response times (in milliseconds or seconds)

parameter.name: times2
parameter.description: Second set of response times. Required for compare, detect_difference.

parameter.name: remove_outliers
parameter.description: Whether to remove outliers before analysis (default: true)

parameter.name: outlier_method
parameter.description: Method for outlier removal: iqr or zscore (default: iqr)

returns.description: Statistical analysis results including significance tests

tool.examples:
# Analyze timing data
analyze [0.123, 0.145, 0.132, 0.156]
# Compare two datasets
compare [0.1, 0.12, 0.11] [0.5, 0.52, 0.51]
# Detect significant difference
detect_difference [0.1, 0.12, 0.11] [0.5, 0.52, 0.51]
